name: GEORGIE-YOLKIE™ Enhanced
short_description: GEORGIE-YOLKIE™ is an all-new purrfect open-world platformer and collectathon! With huge, beautiful worlds, meet an unforgettable cast of silly characters as buddy-duo Georgie (The cat guy) and Yolkie (The yellow bird) embark on an epic, funny adventure to thwart the evil King Rattie! Now enhanced!
detailed_description:
Just Updated

Specially enhanced edition with 4K graphics support, raycasting, quality of life features and bundled with Georgie-Yolkie 64!


About the Game

One kitten. One bird. Zero clue what they’re doing.

Join Georgie, a fluffball with more enthusiasm than sense, and Yolkie, a chirpy sidekick who thinks she’s the brains of the operation (she’s not), as they stumble, flap, and paw their way through a kingdom overrun by Rattie's minions with delusions of grandeur.

It’s a puzzle-platforming adventure full of questionable decisions, dramatic meows, and the kind of teamwork that makes you wonder how these two haven’t been beaten yet.

GEORGIE-YOLKIE — because saving the world is better with feathers and fur.

With a giant open world and no less than ten other worlds full of bright colorful and weird characters, jump, swim, bounce and defy gravity as the worlds of Felina unravel around you, with a fun musical score and excellent replay value.

  • Jump, run, spin, go upside down, glide, swim and more as you progress through the massive and detailed worlds and combat challenging quirky bosses and meet with silly characters in a humorous story, a love letter to classic platformers of the ninetees!

  • Ten worlds with different challenges and collect those shiny objects to progress through the worlds of Felina.

  • A purrfect catchy soundtrack and natural effects that bring the game to life and make it an unforgettable adventure

  • And a load more- play challenging mini-games and mix-it-up after beating the game!

  • Now enhanced with raycasting, HD Textures, special effects and quality of life improvements!

  • Includes Georgie-Yolkie 64 - The Furry Tale!
